description_long: This object is a cylindrical, reddish-brown food item resembling a classic hot dog sausage. Its surface is matte and slightly uneven, with subtle color variations ranging from reddish to light brown, suggesting a cooked or processed meat product. Both ends are rounded, with one end showing a small, circular opening typical of sausage casings. The object lacks any visible bun, condiments, or packaging, and there are no grill marks or decorative features. The texture appears semi-soft, with a slight sheen but no glossiness. Its size and shape are consistent with a standard hot dog sausage commonly found in urban food settings.
description: A reddish-brown, cylindrical hot dog sausage with a matte, slightly uneven surface and no bun or condiments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the sausage, with a slightly curved, reddish-brown surface and no visible bun or condiments.
description_view_1: End view displaying the circular opening of the sausage casing, highlighting the rounded tip and internal cavity.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the elongated body and subtle color variations.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite side, again showing a rounded tip with a visible opening, but from a slightly different angle.
